title: Intrepid Ukrainian Chickpeas Salad
description: A floral, snappy chickpea salad with fines-herbes, dehydrated sun‑dried tomato, and a citrus vinaigrette that marries Ukrainian spirit with Mediterranean flair.
instructions: Rinse the drained chickpeas under cold water and set aside.
Roast the sliced red bell pepper in a hot oven at 220°C for 5 minutes until softened.
Chop the sun‑dried tomato into bite‑sized pieces.
Dice the cucumber and thinly slice the red onion.
Chop the arugula and fines‑herbes mix into small fragments.
In a small bowl whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, Dijon mustard, dried oregano, salt, and pepper to create the vinaigrette.
Place the chickpeas, roasted pepper, sun‑dried tomato, cucumber, onion, arugula, and fines‑herbes in a large mixing bowl.
Pour the vinaigrette over the salad and toss gently until all components are evenly coated.
Let the salad rest for 5 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Serve chilled, spooned into bowls or on toasted pita for an adventurous snack.
